entity.name: Smart Predictive System for Industrial Machinery Using Machine Learning
entity.description: The Smart Predictive  System for Industrial Machinery Using Machine Learning is an intelligent solution designed to predict potential machine failures before they occur. Industrial equipment continuously generates operational data through sensors that monitor parameters such as air temperature, process temperature, rotational speed, torque, and tool wear. By analyzing this data, machine learning algorithms can identify patterns associated with equipment failures and predict whether a machine is likely to fail.
entity.creator: psusmija@gmail.com
